description: This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.
current_state_bullets: **Codebase metrics:** ~97k production LoC; ~12k test LoC across 22 suites (including AK3 regression suites, AK4 end-to-end ABI round-trip suite, and v0.29.12 AK6-G/H/I runtime-trace additions); ~2,830 theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom).

**Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.29.0_COMPREHENSIVE.md) — pre-1.0 full-kernel audit (2 CRITICAL, 23 HIGH, ~76 MED, ~101 LOW). WS-AK Phases AK1–AK6 complete (v0.29.1–v0.29.12); remaining phases AK7–AK10 target v1.0.0.

**Active workstream:** **WS-AK Phase AK6 COMPLETE** with audit remediation (v0.29.12) — Pre-1.0 Release Hardening (v0.29.0 audit), Phase AK6: Information Flow + SchedContext Correctness. Delivered in v0.29.9 (10 sub-tasks AK6-A..AK6-J: 2 HIGH, 6 MEDIUM, 7 LOW findings); AK6-F per-arm per-op theorem coverage extended in v0.29.10–v0.29.11 (14/14 arms named); v0.29.12 audit remediation added substantiveness-tiering corrections (5 truly substantive / 3 hybrid / 6 closure-form with discharge recipes), 3 new frame lemmas, and runtime test coverage for AK6-G/H/I. Prior: AK5 (v0.29.5–v0.29.6), AK4 (v0.29.4–v0.29.8), AK3 (v0.29.3), AK2 (v0.29.2), AK1 (v0.29.1), **WS-AJ PORTFOLIO COMPLETE** (v0.28.1–v0.29.0), WS-AI (v0.27.7–v0.28.0), WS-AH (v0.27.2–v0.27.6), WS-AG (v0.26.0–v0.27.1), WS-AF–WS-B. **Next:** AK7–AK10 (continued pre-1.0 hardening); then WS-V (AG10: Hardware Integration).
**Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
**Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
**Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).
